warnings: template_id 'template_진단수술비_v1' is provisional; per pipeline.md and open-decisions.md #2 the per-template required-section rules are not yet defined and document-assembly does not enforce them. Sections were chosen sensibly per the draft-report spec and screening_report.draft_writer_input_summary.sections_to_emphasize.

Single-document case: the draft is built from one insurer-response pack (DOC_001) covering three insurers; no policy/diagnosis/medical/imaging document exists in-case, so all clause and diagnosis references trace to what the denial notices themselves quote.

P3 hedge-and-flag: 4 inference-bearing determinations are deliberately left open and routed for review rather than asserted — (1) the pivotal I67.8 진단확정 요건3 objective-establishment question (→의사), (2) R04/R05 characterization of the denial reason (→손해사정사), (3) accident/onset date single-source substitute mappings (→손해사정사), (4) the preliminary case-outcome leaning (→손해사정사·의사). No definitive legal/medical assertion is made; forbidden-expression substitutions applied.
